question: How many days had passed since I bought my Adidas running shoes when I realized one of the shoelaces on my old Converse sneakers had broken?
gold_answer: 14 days. 15 days (including the last day) is also acceptable.
reasoning_summary: User bought Adidas running shoes on January 10, 2023 (source 186). User realized one shoelace on old Converse sneakers broke on January 24, 2023 (source 83). The number of days between these two dates is 15 days.
